calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause Hearing is reset to Jan-30-2024 at 10:30am in Dept 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ryan Youabian, Esq. (310.424.5252) for moving party, (audio only).
No other appearances.

In-Camera-Review Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF TAMEKA CULLINS is GRANTED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order on mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
